allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; vs=[v for v in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if not 'canary' in v and not 'beta' in v and not 'rc' in v and not 'alpha' in v]; print\('latest stable:', vs[-1]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; vs=[v for v in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if not 'canary' in v and not 'beta' in v and not 'rc' in v and not 'alpha' in v]; print\('latest stable v4:', [v for v in vs if v.startswith\('4.'\)][-1]\); print\('latest stable:', vs[-1]\)")
